parsed.clarification_question: Which check should I prioritize? A) Writing polish (grammar/clarity) [R1.6]; B) Argument and claims (thesis framing, logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, novelty/overclaim tone) [R1.1–R1.4]; C) Structural reorganization (section/subsection ordering) [R1.5]; D) Scholarship/novelty audit and citations [R1.4, R1.7].

rationale.RX.1: The request 'Check this' is ambiguous, so I need to surface what I do and do not infer about the intended review scope.
rationale.RX.2: The text includes strong 'first' and safety-related claims, so the projection must emphasize avoiding overstatement pending clarification.
rationale.RX.3: Scope discipline is required to ensure I only project responsibilities aligned with the chosen check and do not edit or execute tasks prematurely.
rationale.RX.4: Given the safety context of process control, guarding against projections that could enable harmful misinterpretations is important.
rationale.RX.5: Any subsequent assessment should be traceable to the provided text, with assumptions clearly marked to maintain provenance.
